Bank statement dates show a chronological discontinuity: page 20 ends on 09-01-2026, but page 21 starts on 11-01-2026, leaving 10-01-2026 unaccounted for.
While page 1 implies a start date of 24-04-2025, sequential detailed transactions on page 2 do not begin until 29-05-2025, indicating missing pages or a gap in early records.
